title: Smart Choice Scented Pet Bubbles Chicken and Beef
features: ●Beef Scent and Chicken: These scented bubbles capture your dog's attention and stimulate their senses, making playtime more enjoyable and rewarding. ●Makes large bubbles that last long in the air. ●Interactive Fun: Blow bubbles for your dog to chase and pop,promotes physical exercise and mental stimulation. ●Safe Ingredients: Formulated with non-toxic ingredients. ●Easy to Use: Simply blow bubbles using the included wand inside bottle. ●The lightweight formula creates bubbles that float gently in the air for your dog to enjoy. Portable Size: With a convenient 120ml bottle, portable and perfect for outdoor play. ●Twin Pack: 2 x 120ml bottles. ●Wand atached to bottle cap.
description: Product description Scented Dog Bubbles Beef and Chicken 2 x 120ml Make playtime with your furry friend even more exciting with these Scented Dog Bubbles. These bubbles provide a unique and enjoyable experience for your dog, encouraging active play and engagement. Key Features: Beef and chicken scent: Infused with the enticing aroma of beef and one of chicken, these scented bubbles capture your pet's attention and stimulate their senses, making playtime more enjoyable and rewarding. Large bubbles: The large wand make large long lasting bubble perfect on windy days as bubbles easily form in the wind or with a genlt blow to thw wand. Interactive Fun: Blow bubbles for your dog to chase and pop, creating a fun and engaging activity that promotes physical exercise and mental stimulation. Safe Ingredients: Formulated with non-toxic ingredients, these dog bubbles are safe for your pet to interact with, ensuring worry-free playtime. Easy to Use: Simply blow bubbles using the included wand and watch as your dog eagerly chases and pops them. The lightweight formula creates bubbles that float gently in the air for your dog to enjoy. Portable Size: With a convenient 120ml bottle, these scented dog bubbles are portable and perfect for outdoor play in the park, backyard, or anywhere else your dog loves to play. Twin Pack: 2 x 120ml bottles. Bottle Lid: Colour will be Blue and green with white lid. Enhance your dog's playtime with the Scented Dog Bubbles. Watch as your furry friend delights in chasing and popping the enticing bubbles, creating lasting memories of fun and excitement. Directions Warning! Choking hazard-small parts, not suitable for children. Harmfull if swallowed. Do not drink. Do not allow your pet to play with the bottle or blower wand. Keep out of reach of babies and children. Store out of pet's reach when not in use. Use only as directed-blow the bubbles high into the air. Never aim at your pets or human eyes. If contact with eyes o curs rinse with warm water to avoid irritation. Always play on non stainable surface. This is an interactive toy to be used by an adilt. Alwats waa your hands after use. Store in a cool dry place.
